title: Mobile App Developer Intern
description_html:
Make is the leading visual platform for anyone to design, build, and automate anything—from tasks and workflows to apps and systems—without the need for coding skills. We are headquartered in the flourishing tech hub of Prague, Czech Republic, and our teams are spread across the USA, UK, Germany, France, Canada, India and Chile, among other locations.

We’re looking for a Mobile App Developer Intern (Working Student) to help build and shape the next generation of the Make mobile app, in a highly autonomous setup backed by the scale, impact, and resources of Make. 💜

This is not a shadowing internship. You will ship, starting from August.

Please note: interview for this role requires on-site presence on the afternoon of 22 July at our Prague office.

 

The technical challenge

Make runs millions of scenarios daily across 200+ countries, with a reliability SLO target of 99.95%. On mobile, you’ll help build a native experience on top of that platform using modern technologies (Kotlin Multiplatform and SwiftUI) and integrate with our backend services over RESTful APIs.

We deploy many times a day, use feature flags for conscious releases, and expect engineers to own their work end-to-end, from idea to production. You’ll stay close to the product, prototyping fast and iterating constantly.

The team you’ll join

You’ll join the mobile engineering effort within our Product, eXperiences & Engineering org, working side by side with the engineering lead who owns mobile and the product manager shaping where the apps go next. The setup is small and largely greenfield, so your footprint is big from day one: you help define how mobile works at Make, not just maintain what exists, and your features reach users on iOS and Android worldwide.

What you’ll do

  •     Rapidly prototype, implement features, and optimize mobile experiences
  •     Interface with backend engineering teams to align on API contracts and data integration
  •     Submit pull requests, receive structured feedback, and pair program on complex problems
  •     Use AI tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Copilot as part of your daily workflow
  •     Work on features used by thousands of global users

Who we’re looking for

Core foundations

  •     Currently enrolled or a recent graduate of a university program 
  •     Fluent English (spoken and written)
  •     Solid software engineering foundations: clean logic, problem-solving, and a good grasp of programming basics
  •     Basic knowledge or experience in mobile development: Swift/SwiftUI, Kotlin, or cross-platform concepts (side projects, school projects, or hobby apps count)
  •     Basic understanding of RESTful APIs and how a mobile client fetches and sends data to backend services
  •     AI literacy: eagerness to use modern agentic development workflows (Claude Code, Cursor) responsibly and effectively
  •     Platform fluency a plus (Slack, Google Workspace, etc.)

Mindset matters

  •     High agency and autonomy: you take ownership and figure out how to get things done
  •     A balanced, AI-assisted developer: you use AI tools heavily to accelerate your work, but you understand exactly what the code does
  •     Creativity and a product mindset: you think about user experience, not just code
  •     You ask “why” before writing code, and you prefer building and iterating over overthinking
  •     You’re not afraid to challenge ideas constructively

What you’ll gain

  •     Production-level coding experience and direct exposure to how global SaaS systems are built
  •     Modern development practices in a professional, AI-native environment
  •     Growth from a pure developer into a holistic builder who balances code quality, design fidelity, and user experience

Practical details

  •     Location: Make office at Palmovka, Prague (at least two days a week in the office)
  •     Commitment: part-time, minimum 20 hours per week, alongside your studies
  •     Duration: 6–12 months
  •     Mentor: directly mentored by a senior engineering manager

Benefits

  •     Flexible working hours and home office
  •     Multisport card
  •     Snack bar and refreshments in the office
  •     Annual learning budget and access to learning platforms
  •     Company events (summer/winter parties, tech talks, and more)

Hiring process

  •     You apply (applications reviewed on a rolling basis)
  •     Selected candidates join Intern Day at our Prague office on the afternoon of 22 July 2026
  •     Offers and onboarding from August

Looking forward to your application! 💜

title: Student/ka pro AI automatizaci v advokátní kanceláři!
description_html:
AK Erudit hledá šikovného studenta nebo studentku se zájmem o AI, automatizaci a praktické využití technologií v právním prostředí.

Chceme postupně zavádět AI nástroje, které pomohou s rutinními a časově náročnými činnostmi v advokátní kanceláři – zejména při práci s dokumenty, vyhledávání informací ve spisech, extrakci údajů, kontrole kompletnosti podkladů, třídění dokumentace, přípravě výstupů a interní znalostní bázi.

Nejde o nahrazení práce advokáta ani právního úsudku. AI má sloužit jako podpůrný nástroj. Finální kontrola, právní posouzení a rozhodnutí vždy zůstávají na odpovědné osobě.

Co budeš dělat

Budeš fungovat jako technická a projektová podpora při zavádění AI v AK Erudit. Spolupracovat budeš přímo s lidmi z praxe, kteří jednotlivé agendy zpracovávají, a pomáhat převádět jejich potřeby do konkrétních AI nebo automatizačních řešení.

Typicky půjde o:

  • mapování rutinních procesů vhodných pro automatizaci,
  • návrh a testování AI asistenta pro práci s dokumenty,
  • práci s PDF, DOCX, skeny, e-maily a dalšími typy podkladů,
  • testování OCR, extrakce dat, promptů a jazykových modelů,
  • ověřování možností RAG řešení nad interní dokumentací,
  • tvorbu jednoduchých skriptů, workflow nebo prototypů,
  • evidenci chyb, limitů a nepřesností AI výstupů,
  • přípravu stručných návodů a dokumentace pro uživatele.

Koho hledáme

Ideálně studenta/studentku IT, informatiky, datové analytiky, aplikované informatiky nebo příbuzného oboru.

Očekáváme:

  • zájem o AI a automatizaci,
  • základní znalost programování, ideálně Python,
  • schopnost samostatně hledat řešení,
  • schopnost pochopit potřeby lidí mimo IT,
  • pečlivost při práci s dokumenty a daty,
  • zodpovědný přístup k důvěrným informacím,
  • chuť vytvořit praktické řešení, které bude mít reálné využití.

Výhodou je zkušenost s LLM, OCR, API, databázemi, PDF/DOCX zpracováním, RAG, GitHubem nebo tvorbou jednoduchých interních aplikací.

Co nabízíme

  • zapojení do reálného AI/legal tech projektu,
  • možnost pracovat na praktickém řešení pro advokátní kancelář,
  • přímý kontakt s lidmi, kteří znají procesy z praxe,
  • prostor pro vlastní návrhy a technická řešení,
  • flexibilní formu spolupráce dle dohody,
  • možnost využít projekt jako praxi, semestrální práci nebo téma závěrečné práce,
  • zkušenost vhodnou do CV, portfolia nebo GitHubu.

Spolupráce bude probíhat s důrazem na ochranu osobních údajů, důvěrnost dokumentů a bezpečné nakládání s daty.

Pokud tě pozice zaujala, pošli nám krátké představení, CV nebo odkaz na LinkedIn a pár vět o tom, s čím máš zkušenost a proč tě zajímá AI automatizace.

title: Digital Business Trainee - SAP Mattoni Trainee Program

title: Quality Engineer
description_html:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.

This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.

THE ROLE

The Digital & Data Experience (DDX) business unit simplifies fleet management through intelligent, cloud-native solutions. Our SaaS platform enables customers to manage their assets through automation, security, and AI-driven insights.

In this role, you will contribute across the full application development lifecycle while helping build and maintain our data intelligence platform. Working closely with engineering teams, you will develop automated testing solutions, support mission-critical processing services, and help ensure our platform is secure, reliable, and scalable through modern engineering and quality practices.

What You'll Do

  • Work across the full application development lifecycle, designing, developing, testing, operating, and maintaining mission-critical processing services with a focus on security, compliance, and interoperability.
  • Create and maintain test automation for our data intelligence platform, verifying applications across unit, integration, and end-to-end testing layers.
  • Collaborate with peers and stakeholders to identify requirements and take solutions from initial design through production.
  • Contribute to engineering best practices, including code reviews, documentation, continuous integration, and continuous deployment.
  • Experiment with new technologies, platform ecosystems, and AI-assisted approaches to improve automation, platform capabilities, and engineering efficiency.
  • Work with engineering teams to improve application quality, reliability, and testing practices across the DDX business unit.
  • Share testing expertise and quality engineering best practices to support continuous improvement across the team.
  • We are primarily an in-office environment and therefore, you will be expected to work from the Prague office in compliance with Everpure's policies, unless you are on PTO, or work travel, or other approved leave.

What You Bring

  • Experience designing, implementing, testing, and operating software applications or platform components.
  • Proficiency in Python, Java, Go, or another modern programming language, with an interest in learning new technologies.
  • Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud, including Kubernetes.
  • Experience working with SQL and NoSQL databases, data structures, algorithms, and modern software engineering practices.
  • Experience building and maintaining automated tests across unit, integration, and end-to-end testing layers.
  • Familiarity with AI-assisted QA automation and cloud networking concepts.
  • Strong collaboration, communication, and problem-solving skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment.

What You Can Expect From Us

  • Innovation: We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
  • Growth: We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
  • Team: We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.

And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company-sponsored team events. Check out purebenefits.com for more information.

Accommodations And Accessibility

Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at TA-Ops@purestorage.com if you’re invited to an interview.

Our Commitment To a Strong And Inclusive Team

We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.

Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or any other characteristic legally protected by the laws of the jurisdiction in which you are being considered for hire.

Join us and bring your best.

Bring your bold.

Pure and simple.

title: BI Developer v Microsoft Fabric
description_html:
💡 Baví tě data, SQL a Python? Chceš se naučit pracovat s nejnovější technologií MS Fabric, která teprve přepisuje pravidla hry? A k tomu mít možnost mluvit s klienty a vidět, že tvoje práce má dopad? Pak hledáme právě tebe 👇


Kdo jsme?

Jsme DataBrothers – 25 lidí, a už 5 let pomáháme firmám zefektivnit práci s daty. Začínali jsme s Power BI, ale posouváme hranice dál.

Jsme tým, kde se navzájem známe jménem, máme otevřené karty a rosteš podle svého tempa.


Co budeš dělat?

  • Podílet se na externích projektech (někdy i interních), vždy v tandemu se zkušenějšími kolegy.
  • Řešit ETL procesy → získávání, transformaci a nahrávání dat do Data Warehouse nebo do Data Lakes.
  • Stavět strukturované datové sklady pro podporu byznysového rozhodování.
  • Pracovat s API a různými konektory.
  • Stavět datové modely včetně jejich vizualizací, které stojí za každým kvalitním reportingem.
  • Budeš komunikovat s klienty, zjišťovat jejich potřeby a navrhovat řešení.
  • Využívat náš vlastní framework postavený na MS Fabric, který neustále vylepšujeme.
  • Postupně se staneš specialistou na Microsoft Fabric – na trhu je to pořád novinka, a my tě to naučíme pořádně.

👉 Nemusíš znát všechno – záleží nám na tom, abys měl/a chuť učit se a posouvat.


S čím přijdeš do styku:

  • MS Fabric, Power BI, Azure Data Factory, Azure Storage Account, Apache Spark, SQL Server, Logic Apps, Key Vault, Apache Airflow
  • Jazyky: Python, PySpark, Power Query (M), DAX, T-SQL, PowerShell
  • Struktury: Schema definition, Partitioning, Metadata driven ETL, a další (např: Graph Structures, DAG, Time-Series)


Koho hledáme?

  • Máš zkušenost se stavěním datových skladů nebo datových modelů, ideálně v prostředí MS Fabric a Power BI, případně v jiných aplikacích.
  • Umíš T-SQL, Python, (nebo jiný programovací jazyk), případně DAX, Power Query (M).
  • Baví tě práce s daty, a hledat a navrhovat řešení – např. poznání dat, jejich zpracování a následná tvorba řešení pro zákazníka.
  • Láká tě kombinace technické práce a konzultace s klienty.
  • Máš chuť růst v oblastech jako jsou datové sklady, Lakehouse, MS Fabric, API a další.


Co nabízíme

  • 25+ dní volna a flexibilní home office (v základu 2 dny na HO a 3 dny v kanclu)
  • Školení (technická i soft skills) + možnost certifikací.
  • 20 % ročního zisku rozdělujeme mezi konzultanty a vývojáře.
  • Jasná pravidla pro růst pozice i platu – můžeš si říct i několikrát do roka.
  • Multisportka, skvělá káva a sleva v Zrno Zrnko (máme kancelář v Nuslích).
  • Team buildingy (2× dvoudenní + 2× večerní akce ročně), hospody, vánoční oběd.
  • Chceš vystupovat na konferencích? Podpoříme tě - máme vlastní - a to rovnou 2. Zároveň se nejen tam, ale i na našich workshopech můžeš vzdělávat od MVPs. Spolupracujeme také s WUG komunitou v Praze i Brně.

title: Junior Security Operations Specialist (DLP & SIEM)
description_html:
Job Description

Start v kyberbezpečnosti, kde se naučíš pracovat s incidenty i moderními nástroji

Chceš nastartovat kariéru v kyberbezpečnosti a pracovat v prostředí, kde se naučíš, jak funguje Security Operations v praxi?

Hledáme juniorního kolegu do SOC týmu, který bude pracovat s bezpečnostními alerty, pomáhat s ochranou dat a postupně se zapojovat do řešení incidentů i zlepšování detekčních pravidel.

Your future duties and responsibilities

  • Práce s bezpečnostními alerty (SIEM / DLP)

Budeš vyhodnocovat alerty, rozlišovat mezi reálnými hrozbami a false positives a učit se, jak funguje detekce útoků.

  • Podpora při řešení incidentů

Zapojíš se do analýzy bezpečnostních incidentů, budeš sbírat informace, dokumentovat průběh a spolupracovat se zkušenějšími kolegy.

  • Základy práce s DLP (ochrana dat)

Pomůžeš s vyhodnocováním alertů a správou výjimek. Postupně se naučíš, jak nastavovat pravidla tak, aby dávala smysl.

  • Monitoring a zlepšování detekce

Naučíš se, jak fungují SIEM nástroje, jak vznikají detekční pravidla a jak se ladí, aby byly efektivní.

  • Spolupráce v týmu

Budeš pracovat s kolegy ze SOC, infrastruktury i bezpečnosti a postupně se učit komunikovat technická témata srozumitelně.

Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role

  • Máš základní orientaci v kyberbezpečnosti (škola, kurzy, vlastní projekty nebo první praxe)
  • Zajímá tě, jak fungují kybernetické útoky a jak je detekovat
  • Máš základní přehled o sítích, operačních systémech nebo IT infrastruktuře
  • Chceš se učit nové věci a rozvíjet se v oblasti security
  • Jsi pečlivý/á a baví tě analyzovat problémy

Co oceníme navíc

  • Základní zkušenost se SOC, SIEM nebo security nástroji (např. Sentinel, QRadar, Defender…)
  • Znalost základních pojmů (SIEM, DLP, EDR, MITRE ATT&CK)
  • Skriptování (PowerShell, Python) nebo zájem o automatizaci
  • Certifikace nebo kurzy (např. Security+, SC-200, CySA+)

Benefity

  • Akciový program
  • CGI program pomoci
  • Plně hrazená nemocenská až 30 dní v roce
  • Bezúročné půjčky
  • Referral program
  • Stravenky 140Kč
  • Životní pojištění
  • Očkování proti chřipce a klíšťové encefalitidě
  • Multisport karta
  • Kafeterie 900Kč měsíčně
  • Hybridní pracovní model a flexibilní pracovní doba
  • 5 týdnů dovolené + 3 dny sick day
  • Narozeninové volno a CSR den

A mnoho dalších…



Společně, jako vlastníci, převádíme odborné znalosti do praxe.

Život ve společnosti CGI je založen na vlastnictví, týmové práci, respektu a pocitu sounáležitosti. U nás můžete naplno využít svůj potenciál.

Zveme vás, abyste se od prvního dne stali vlastníky. Společně pracujeme na tom, aby se náš sen stal skutečností. Proto o sobě mluvíme jako o partnerech CGI, a ne jako o zaměstnancích. Těžíme z našeho společného úspěchu a máme možnost a odpovědnost aktivně se podílet na směřování a strategii naší společnosti.

Vaše práce vytváří hodnoty. Budete rozvíjet inovativní řešení a trvalé vztahy s kolegy a klienty a zároveň budete mít přístup ke globálním možnostem, abyste mohli proměnit své nápady ve skutečnost, využít nové příležitosti a těžit z předních odborných znalostí v oboru a technologií.

Budete rozvíjet svou kariéru tím, že se připojíte ke společnosti, která je postavena, aby rostla a přetrvala. Podpoří vás vedoucí pracovníci, kterým záleží na vašem zdraví a pohodě, a kteří vám pomohou využít příležitostí k rozvoji vašich dovedností a rozšíření obzorů.

Přidejte se k nám, k jedné z největších firem poskytujících poradenské služby v oblasti IT na světě.

title: Embedded Software Engineer
description_html:
We are looking for new colleagues into our SW development team on the position of Embedded SW Engineer. You will help us develop key features of a product that will define vehicle traits for the next decade.


What you will do:

You will participate in the development of new applications to be deployed in future cars (production from 2025). For our customers within the VW group, we are developing projects such as:

  • Exterior Monitoring for ADAS function
  • Perception and Sensor fusion topics
  • In cabin monitoring
  • Data processing
  • Comfort functions

New projects are coming every year.


What will be your responsibilities:

  • You will become a member of a international team (size usually 5-8) that implements features for a Linux-based automotive systems and functions close to ADAS and comfort and safety In cabin systems.
  • Your code will be reviewed by other team members and vice versa. Code quality, adherence to the architecture and solid test coverage are important.
  • You will implement embedded functionalities in C++.
  • You will need to understand and partake in software requirements,design specifications and target HW integration.
  • Your code will need to comply with Automotive standards (AUTOSAR coding guideline) and processes (ASPICE).


Who you are:

  • You have a degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Software Engineering or equivalent.
  • You have modern programming skills, preferably in C++ and VScode and basic knowledge of Linux.
  • You have experience in vision based systems and algorithms
  • Domain knowledge in traffic (i.e. light and Stop/Yield-Sign processing, road level Map data)
  • Road model algorithms in fusion and tracking
  • If You have also programming skills in Python and ML/AI background that will be an asset
  • You are able to communicate in English.
  • Knowledge of tools such as Jira, Conan, Jenkins, Git, Codebeamer will be your advantage.
  • You are based in the Czech Republic


Why you may want to work with us:

  • You will be surrounded by skilled colleagues from whom you can learn.
  • We offer mentorship and learning programs, training, language courses.
  • You can work remotely as well as from the office. It is up to you.
  • We have a fair and transparent management team.
  • There are challenges in front of us: many of the services are being implemented from scratch in a prototyping manner.
  • You will influence and shape functionality of future cars (Audi Trinity, Porsche eMacan…).
  • We are in Czech Republic with direct contacts to customers and colleagues abroad (Germany, Serbia).


Additionally, our company provides a number of interesting BENEFITS, such as:

  • Individual plan of learning and development, attending conferences, participation in company innovation program, language courses
  • Flexible working hours
  • Cafeteria benefit system
  • Special reduced price of operating leasing for Škoda cars
  • Meal subsidy
  • Multisport card
  • Company contribution for supplementary pension insurance from 900 CZK/month
  • Sick days
  • Travel insurance for private purposes even for family members
  • T-Mobile Program – tariffs even for family members
  • Motivating reward for recommending new colleagues
  • 5 weeks of holiday
  • Company events


Send us your CV - looking forward to meeting you!

title: ServiceNow SP Developer (43126)
description_html:
I am looking for a ServiceNow Service Portal Developer to design and build user-facing components within the platform. You will develop widgets, pages and catalog items, customize portal layouts and ensure smooth end-to-end functionality. The role involves close collaboration with analysts and architects, as well as participation in agile delivery. I expect hands-on ServiceNow experience, strong JavaScript skills and CSA certification, along with the ability to deliver clean and maintainable solutions.

🚀 Project

  • developing and configuring ServiceNow Service Portal components including widgets, pages, catalog items, record producers and content blocks
  • implementing user-facing functionality based on functional specifications and user stories
  • building and customizing portal themes, layouts and navigation structures
  • developing and configuring service catalog items and associated workflows
  • writing clean and maintainable JavaScript, HTML and CSS for custom widgets and enhancements
  • collaborating with business analysts to clarify requirements and contribute to solution design
  • ensuring development follows platform governance standards and best practices
  • participating in agile ceremonies including sprint planning, reviews and retrospectives
  • performing unit testing and supporting UAT by resolving defects and implementing feedback
  • documenting developed components and customizations

🎯 Skills

  • ServiceNow CSA certification
  • proven hands-on experience with ServiceNow platform development
  • strong JavaScript skills including ServiceNow widget framework
  • understanding of UI and interface design principles
  • English at working proficiency level

💡 Nice to have

  • experience with Angular or other modern JavaScript frameworks
  • understanding of UX principles and accessibility standards
  • experience with ServiceNow Flow Designer or Workflow Editor

title: Data Engineer - Objevte svět Databricks s námi!
description_html:
Note: Czech language is mandatory. Hybrid role. Prague & surroundings. No full remote from abroad.


Zajímá tě práce s velkými daty, ale nemáš, kde sbírat zkušenosti? Přidej se do Big Data týmu a uč se přímo na projektech. Náš tým 40 vývojářů, datových inženýrů, vědců a administrátorů má za sebou 10+ postavených on premise Big Data platforem, přes 120 analytických a aplikačních projektů.


BigData tým pracuje na různorodých projektech napříč Adastrou – od bankovnictví přes retail až po automotive průmysl.


Co budeš mít na starosti:

První týdny se zaměříš na rozvoj znalostí v BigData a Cloud technologiích. Seznámíš se s nástroji, které třeba ještě neznáš, a naučíš se je používat v praxi. Postupně se začleníš na některý z projektů. Dáme ti důvěru plnit úkoly samostatně, ale zároveň budeš mít svého mentora pro podporu a konzultace.


Co tě čeká:

  • Návrh a implementace end-to-end datových řešení na míru pro klienta včetně datové kvality, návrhu datových modelů, automatizace procesů a dalších aspektů
  • Úzká spolupráce s klientem i kolegy.
  • Práce s nejmodernějšími technologiemi – např. Spark, Delta Lake, Apache Kafka, Databricks, MlFlow, ...
  • Tvorba datových transformací a integrací zejména ve Sparku
  • Prototypování aplikací a řešení – budeš zkoušet nové technologie a volit ty nejvhodnější pro daný problém
  • Zavádění všeho do praxe – analýza, kódování, vývoj i tvorba dokumentace
  • Optimalizace výkonu a škálování aplikace pro obrovské datové objemy
  • Jedeme hodně DevOps, takže budeš mít šanci si svůj kód i nasadit a starat se o něj
  • Pokud některé z technologií výše neznáš, nic se neděje, dostaneš šanci se je naučit. Máme vlastní Hadoop a Databricks cluster „na hraní“, kde můžeš všechno vyzkoušet

Kromě práce na projektu budeš mít prostor na školení a přípravu na certifikace v rámci oboru.


Budeme si rozumět, pokud:

  • Znáš koncept Lakehouse platforem – konkrétně Databricks a máš praktické zkušenosti s Delta Lake a Apache Spark
  • Máš zkušenost s alespoň jedním poskytovatelem cloudových služeb – Azure/AWS/GCP
  • Ovládáš dotazování v SQL na vysoké úrovni
  • Máš zkušenosti s verzovacím systémem GIT a s CI/CD
  • Máš zkušenosti s vývojem v Python
  • Rád(a) se učíš nové věci a pracuješ v různorodém prostředí
  • Máš týmového ducha a svoje znalosti a dovednosti se nebojíš sdílet
  • Jsi komunikativní a umíš anglicky – nebojíš se pre-sale a prezentací u zákazníka

Výhodou jsou zkušenosti s:

  • Optimalizacemi aplikací psaných v Apache Spark a obecně paralelního zpracování dat
  • Zlepšování performance na Delta Lake platformě
  • Oblastí DWH – SCD2 a CDC, BI, Data Quality


A kdo jsme my:

  • Parta lidí, které spojuje nadšení pro práci s daty a nové technologie
  • Jsme týmoví hráči a zároveň máme rádi klid na práci – a to očekáváme i od tebe. Na projektech tvoříme menší týmy, takže na to nikdy nebudeš sám/sama.
  • Platí u nás heslo, že když něčemu nerozumíš, tak se zeptáš – během prvních měsíců dostaneš prostor na učení se a budeš mít při ruce mentora.
  • Máme vlastní Hadoop cluster „na hraní“ a zároveň si můžeš vše vyzkoušet i v Data Science Workbench od Cloudery, což je v Evropě poměrně vzácnost
  • V rámci týmu si pořádáme společné odborné workshopy a přednášky.
  • Kdyby toho bylo málo, volně k dispozici máš kurzy a školení na Udemy, Datacamp, A Cloud Guru a také e-booky na O`Reilly
  • Nad rámec firemních akcí si organizujeme společné grilovačky, herní večery s deskovkami nebo MtG anebo vyrážíme na celotýmové výjezdy do přírody.


Proč věříme, že ti v Adastře bude dobře:

  • Jsme stabilní mezinárodní firma s multiprojektovým prostředím, která pořád roste
  • Pod jednou střechou sdružujeme špičkové technologie a zkušené experty ze všech možných IT odvětví
  • Jednáme spolu na rovinu a ceníme si proaktivního přístupu
  • Sídlíme v krásných kancelářích Mississippi House v Karlíně

Mimo to se můžeš těšit na:

  • Neformální atmosféru – po práci se potkáváme na společenských i sportovních akcích (a těch není zrovna málo)
  • 25 dnů volna do začátku a každý rok ti k nim přidáme jeden den volna navíc
  • Flexibilní pracovní dobu i home office – vše podle domluvy
  • Lekce angličtiny, pokud se v ní potřebuješ zlepšit
  • Široké možnosti vzdělávání – tréninky, přednášky, webináře i certifikace
  • Měsíční příspěvek do Cafeterie, který můžeš využít na různé volnočasové aktivity nebo na Multisport kartu
  • Příspěvek na stravování
  • V kuchyňkách najdeš výbornou kávu, velký výběr čajů i jiné nápoje + ovocné a svačinové bedýnky plné dobrot
  • Slevy u našich partnerů – ať už jde o elektroniku, kulturu či služby
  • Dny FIT Adastra, protože nám záleží na tvém zdraví – můžeš využít odborná vyšetření, konzultace a různé aktivity pro podporu fyzické i psychické kondice
  • Rádi podporujeme, když chceš pomáhat, takže dostaneš 1 den placeného volna navíc na dobrovolnické aktivity dle svého výběru
  • Placené volno navíc, pokud doprovázíš svého prvňáčka v první školní den
  • Chceš procestovat svět, napsat knihu nebo si jen dát pauzu? Po 3 letech u nás si můžeš vzít Sabbatical leave
  • Štědrý referral program, pokud nám pomůžeš najít nové Adastřany

title: RPA Developer
description_html:
Description & Requirements

Koho hledáme

Do oddělení Tax Technology pod vedením

  • Chceš nám pomoct v Brně nebo Praze kompletně zajistit vývoj interních robotů?
  • Máš chuť se pustit do vývoje robotů i pro naše externí klienty?
  • Náš tým působí jako malý start-up s agilní přístupem k vývoji, blízkou spoluprací s koncovými uživateli a volností dělat si věci po svém. Vidíš se v něm? Pokud ano, čti dál a určitě neváhej se nám ozvat 😉.

🟢 Co potřebuješ pro tuto pozici?

  • seznámení se s vývojem automatizací, algoritmizací a přehled v programování robotů (není to hard-core programování, ale základní povědomí o programování se bude hodit)
  • chuť se ponořit do kompletního procesu vývoje automatizací (analýza, vývoj, testování, support a rozvoj)
  • výhodou jsou zkušenosti s některým RPA nástrojem (ideálně UiPath nebo Power Automate, Blue Prism, Nice…)
  • znalost SQL, PowerBI výhodou
  • máš smysl pro detail a výsledek práce je pro tebe důležitý
  • češtinu / slovenštinu máš na perfektní úrovni
  • nebojíš se angličtiny

👨‍💻Co bude tvými hlavními úkoly?

  • vyvíjet-konfigurovat RPA (Robotic Process Automation) roboty v technologii UiPath, Power Automate
  • zapojit se do kompletního procesu od Feasibility study a tvorby Business Case
  • provádět analýzy a testování s uživateli robotů
  • zajistit operation proces - údržba, oprava, upgrade
  • komunikovat s interními a externími klienty

🎁 Co ti můžeme nabídnout?

  • Každý den se naučíš něco nového, žádný den není stejný jako ten předchozí.
  • Pracovat budeš také se zkušenými experty, od kterých se můžeš hodně naučit.
  • Naše firemní kultura je oproti ostatním velkým firmám otevřená a přátelská a náš tým je plný fajn lidí. Již od prvního dne si všichni tykáme, a to i s tím nejvyšším šéfem.
  • Na začátek k sobě získáš Buddyho, který ti pomůže v tvých prvních dnech a týdnech.

Do oddělení Tax Technology pod vedením

title: C#/WPF Developer
description_html:
Kdo jsme?

OSC, a.s. - dynamická inženýrská společnost s více než 30 lety zkušeností v energetice.

Jsme stabilním partnerem a součástí silné Skupiny ČEZ.


Vyvinuli jsme a průběžně rozvíjíme výcvikové trenažéry pro operátory jaderných elektráren, na kterých probíhá povinný praktický výcvik a zkoušky.

Jsme klíčový dodavatel řídicích systémů pro řízení portfolia elektráren z centrálního dispečinku jejich provozovatele a poskytování služeb výkonové rovnováhy v přenosové soustavě ČR.

Budujeme kompetence v oblasti IT dodávek informačních systémů, především pro jadernou energetiku.


Koho hledáme?

Do našeho tříčlenného vývojového týmu hledáme C# vývojáře na úrovni junior/medior, který se chce podílet na modernizaci softwarového vybavení simulátoru jaderné elektrárny Temelín.

Čeká tě vývoj desktopových aplikací pro Windows v C# a WPF, které postupně nahrazují původní Linuxové aplikace používané na simulátoru.

Nejde o běžný kancelářský software – budeš pracovat na technicky zajímavém systému, který má přímou vazbu na výcvik operátorů jaderné elektrárny.


Co tě čeká?

  • Vývoj desktopových aplikací v C# a WPF
  • Testování, ladění a údržba vyvíjených aplikací
  • Analýza stávající funkcionality a její převod do nového technologického řešení
  • Spolupráce s vývojovým týmem, specialisty na simulátory a odborníky z energetiky
  • Postupné seznamování s doménou jaderné energetiky a simulátorů


Jaké znalosti a dovednosti bys měl mít?

  • Zkušenost s vývojem v C# a .NET
  • Znalost WPF nebo ochotu se tuto technologii učit
  • Zkušenost s verzovacími systémy, ideálně Git
  • Chuť porozumět existující aplikaci či funkcionalitě a podílet se na návrhu její modernější náhrady
  • Samostatnost, schopnost zorganizovat si vlastní čas a práci


Co považujeme za dodatečnou výhodu?

  • Znalost SQL
  • Základní znalost Linuxu
  • Zkušenost s vývojem desktopových aplikací
  • Zájem o technický software, energetiku nebo simulátory


Co ti za to nabídneme?

  • Unikátní know-how, které nikdo jiný v ČR nemá
  • Práci na projektech v oblasti jaderné energetiky
  • Seniorní tým, který ti pomůže do problematiky rychle proniknout a posouvat se
  • Celý seznam zajímavých benefitů, včetně ročních odměn

title: Junior C# Developer (REST API)
description_html:
Veeam is the Data and AI Trust Company, specializing in helping organizations ensure their data and AI are fully understood, secured, and resilient to enable the acceleration of safe AI at scale. As the market leader in both data resilience and data security posture management, Veeam is built for the convergence of identity, data, security, and AI risk. Headquartered in Seattle with offices in more than 30 countries, Veeam protects over 550,000 customers worldwide, who trust Veeam to keep their businesses running. Join us as we go fearlessly forward together, growing, learning, and making a real impact for some of the world’s biggest brands.


About The Role

As a Junior C# Developer, you will join a team responsible for the backend of the WebUI application and the REST API that powers our core product, Veeam Backup & Replication.

This is a complex, feature-rich product, and the API plays a critical role in enabling full-scale management across all its components. In this team, you will not only contribute to building and improving the API and core modules, but also help enhancing development efficiency.

You will collaborate closely with experienced engineers, and contribute to continuously improving how we build and scale our product.


What You’ll Do

  • Design and develop REST APIs for Veeam Backup & Replication
  • Development of new products and support of existing functionality
  • Participation and individual development of components and the whole architecture of the product


Technologies We Work With

C#, .Net 10, REST API, Windows/Linux, MS SQL, PostgreSQL, Multithreading, AI tools


What You’ll Bring

  • Proficiency in C# and a deep understanding of the .NET platform, data structures, and algorithms
  • Possession of the principles of software design and development
  • Experience with Windows and/or Linux environments
  • English proficiency for daily communication within international teams


What You’ll Get

  • 25 vacation days, 4 sick days, 21 paid medical leave days, plus 4 extra global VeeaMe Days for self-care and 24 paid volunteer hours annually through Veeam Cares
  • Premium private medical insurance for employees and dependents
  • Daily meal vouchers for restaurants and groceries (180 CZK per working day)
  • Flexible cafeteria platform with thousands of lifestyle benefit options
  • Multisport Card for gym and wellness, with family add-on options
  • Annual public transport reimbursement up to a set limit
  • Corporate mobile plan with optional family tariff
  • Opportunities to learn and grow through on-demand libraries (LinkedIn Learning, O’Reilly), mentoring, workshops and learning events like our annual Global Day of Learning

Please note: If the applicant is permanently present outside of the Czech Republic, Veeam reserves the right to refuse to consider the application for a job.

Veeam Software is an equal opportunity employer and does not tolerate discrimination in any form on the basis of race, color, religion, gender, age, national origin, citizenship, disability, veteran status or any other classification protected by federal, state or local law. All your information will be kept confidential.

Personal data collected during the recruitment process will be processed in accordance with our Recruiting Privacy Notice, which explains how your information is collected, used, and handled in connection with hiring activities. By applying for this position, you consent to this processing.

By submitting your application, you confirm that the information provided, including any supporting documents, is complete and accurate to the best of your knowledge. Any misrepresentation, omission, or falsification may result in disqualification from consideration or, if discovered after employment begins, termination of employment.

title: Demo Engineer
description_html:
Bloomreach is building the world’s premier agentic platform for personalization.We’re revolutionizing how businesses connect with their customers, building and deploying AI agents to personalize the entire customer journey.

  • We're taking autonomous search mainstream, making product discovery more intuitive and conversational for customers, and more profitable for businesses.
  • We’re making conversational shopping a reality, connecting every shopper with tailored guidance and product expertise — available on demand, at every touchpoint in their journey.
  • We're designing the future of autonomous marketing, taking the work out of workflows, and reclaiming the creative, strategic, and customer-first work marketers were always meant to do.


And we're building all of that on the intelligence of a single AI engine — Loomi AI — so that personalization isn't only autonomous…it's also consistent.From retail to financial services, hospitality to gaming, businesses use Bloomreach to drive higher growth and lasting loyalty. We power personalization for more than 1,400 global brands, including American Eagle, Sonepar, and Pandora.

We're a small, high-impact engineering team embedded inside the Go-To-Market organisation. Our job is to make Bloomreach impossible to ignore in a sales cycle, by building AI-powered demo environments, solution accelerators, and self-serve tools that let our presales team across the globe tell a compelling, tailored story to every prospect.

We move fast. We experiment constantly. We build things that look polished on the outside and are clever on the inside. And we have outsized influence on deals, what we build ends up in front of some of the world's largest retailers and brands.

The base salary range for this position is €42,000-€52,000. The pay range actually offered will take into account a variety of potential factors considered in compensation, including but not limited to skills, qualifications, geographic location, accomplishments, experience, credentials, internal equity and business needs, and may vary from the range listed above.

The Role

We're looking for a Demo Engineer who is fully AI-native in how they build and with expertise in the Shopify ecosystem.

This isn't a traditional engineering role. You're not maintaining production systems or building features for end-users. This is a 0→1 builder role: you’ll start with an ambiguous presales need, prototype an agentic workflow or demo quickly, test it with the field, and evolve it into a repeatable demo asset or internal product. Our work helps the Go-To-Market team clearly articulate the value of Bloomreach’s platform to prospects and partners. You're building the machinery that lets a world-class presales team show rather than tell; configuring environments, creating agentic workflows, and shipping self-serve tooling that lets solution consultants spin up, customize, and run tailored demos of Bloomreach's full platform without coming back to you every time.

You'll work closely with your team lead (based in the US), so strong async collaboration and ability to connect across time zones with EU and US teams are part of the job.

What You’ll Do

  • Build AI-powered demo experiences - Design and build demo environments that showcase Bloomreach's full platform; as an integrated, intelligent commerce solution. Shopify-first, but always thinking about the holistic story.
  • Enable SC self-service - Build tools and frameworks that let solution consultants create, configure, and personalize demo environments on their own. The goal is a team of SCs who can tailor a demo to a specific prospect's tech stack and use case, without engineering intervention for every request.
  • Ship agentic and AI workflows - Implement and maintain AI-driven demo flows: LLM integrations, agent orchestration, vector search, and real-time personalization layers that bring Loomi and Bloomreach AI to life in demo contexts.
  • Train and enable the field - When you ship something new, you make sure the presales team knows how to use it. You document, demo the demo, and build internal confidence.
  • Keep the lights on - Demo reliability is non-negotiable. You troubleshoot fast, maintain performance in customer-facing environments, and treat a broken demo in front of a prospect with urgency and with the ability to switch gears.


Tech Stack

Primary: TypeScript / JavaScript, PythonFrontend: React, Next.jsBackend: Node.jsAI tooling: Claude Code, Cursor, or equivalent; LLM and agent APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

  • Shopify: Hydrogen (Remix-based), Liquid, Storefront API, Admin API


Version control: Git

Other Skills

  • Creative problem solving - able to translate ambiguous pre‑sales needs into clear technical assets without detailed instructions.
  • Fast learning - comfortable picking up new AI tools, frameworks, and product capabilities quickly.
  • Collaboration with pre‑sales - effective communicator who works well with solution consultants and cross‑functional teams.
  • Global mindset - able to collaborate across time zones when needed.


Strong Advantage

  • Experience with composable commerce and headless architecture patterns
  • Familiarity with AI/LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) and agent orchestration frameworks
  • UX intuition - you know what a demo needs to feel like to land with a VP of Digital at a major retailer
  • Experience in a presales, solutions engineering, or developer advocacy context. You understand what the presales team needs and are proactive about delivering it.
  • Familiarity with Bloomreach or similar platforms (Commerce Experience Cloud, MACH-stack solutions)


Who You Are

  • You default to AI-assisted development: Claude Code, Cursor, or Copilot aren't add-ons for you, they're how you build.
  • You're a fast learner who picks up new tools, frameworks, and product capabilities quickly. And you're energized by the pace, not overwhelmed by it and work well autonomously.
  • You can take a loosely defined brief ("I need something that shows real-time personalization for a pet food brand on Shopify") and turn it into a working demo without waiting for a detailed spec.
  • You're comfortable working with a US-based lead, taking direction well, and collaborating async across EU/US time zones.
  • You communicate clearly with non-technical stakeholders and work well with Solution Consultants and cross-functional teams.
  • You're proactive. You flag blockers early, ask good questions, and don't wait to be told what to do next.


What Success Looks Like In 90 Days

  • Build your first Shopify-based demo environment with support from your lead
  • Contribute to at least one self-serve tool or template that helps SCs work more independently
  • Get ramped on Bloomreach's platforms (Marketing Automation, Search, Loomi AI)
  • Establish a productive working rhythm (daily standups and async communications) with your US-based team lead.


Why This Role

  • You'll have a direct, visible impact on revenue. What you build influences growth and enterprise deals.
  • You'll work at the intersection of AI, commerce, and storytelling; and what you build will help the biggest brands in retail see what’s possible.
  • You'll be part of a small, well-connected team that collaborates across the company.
  • You'll have access to cutting-edge AI tooling and be encouraged to push what's possible with it.
  • You'll grow alongside a presales organisation that's actively investing in AI-first ways of working.


The pay range actually offered will take into account a variety of potential factors considered in compensation, including but not limited to skills, qualifications, geographic location, accomplishments, experience, credentials, internal equity and business needs, and may vary from the range listed above.

Base Salary Range

€42.000—€52.000 EUR

More things you'll like about Bloomreach:

Culture:

  • A great deal of freedom and trust. At Bloomreach we don’t clock in and out, and we have neither corporate rules nor long approval processes. This freedom goes hand in hand with responsibility. We are interested in results from day one.
  • We have defined our 5 values and the 10 underlying key behaviors that we strongly believe in. We can only succeed if everyone lives these behaviors day to day. We've embedded them in our processes like recruitment, onboarding, feedback, personal development, performance review and internal communication.
  • We believe in flexible working hours to accommodate your working style.
  • We work virtual-first with several Bloomreach Hubs available across three continents.
  • We organize company events to experience the global spirit of the company and get excited about what's ahead.
  • We encourage and support our employees to engage in volunteering activities - every Bloomreacher can take 5 paid days off to volunteer*.
  • The Bloomreach Glassdoor page elaborates on our stellar 4.6/5 rating. The Bloomreach Comparably page Culture score is even higher at 4.9/5


Personal Development:

  • We have a People Development Program - participating in personal development workshops on various topics run by experts from inside the company. We are continuously developing & updating competency maps for select functions.
  • Our resident communication coach Ivo Večeřa is available to help navigate work-related communications & decision-making challenges.*
  • Our managers are strongly encouraged to participate in the Leader Development Program to develop in the areas we consider essential for any leader. The program includes regular comprehensive feedback, consultations with a coach and follow-up check-ins.
  • Bloomreachers utilize the $1,500 professional education budget on an annual basis to purchase education products (books, courses, certifications, etc.)*


Well-being:

  • The Employee Assistance Program -- with counselors -- is available for non-work-related challenges.*
  • Subscription to Calm - sleep and meditation app.*
  • We organize ‘DisConnect’ days where Bloomreachers globally enjoy one additional day off each quarter, allowing us to unwind together and focus on activities away from the screen with our loved ones.
  • We facilitate sports, yoga, and meditation opportunities for each other.
  • Extended parental leave up to 26 calendar weeks for Primary Caregivers.*


Compensation:

  • Restricted Stock Units or Stock Options are granted depending on a team member’s role, seniority, and location.*
  • Everyone gets to participate in the company's success through the company performance bonus.*
  • We offer an employee referral bonus of up to $3,000 paid out immediately after the new hire starts.
  • We reward & celebrate work anniversaries -- Bloomversaries!*


(*Subject to employment type. Interns are exempt from marked benefits, usually for the first 6 months.)

Excited? Join us and transform the future of commerce experiences!

If this position doesn't suit you, but you know someone who might be a great fit, share it - we will be very grateful!

Any unsolicited resumes/candidate profiles submitted through our website or to personal email accounts of employees of Bloomreach are considered property of Bloomreach and are not subject to payment of agency fees.

title: GenAI Engineer
description_html:
Shape the Future of Financial Services with Capco

At Capco, we specialize in management consulting and software development, partnering with leading international banks and insurance companies across Western Europe. Our innovative approach and collaborative culture make us the ideal place for professionals looking to make an impact in financial services technology.

Want to learn more about our culture and people? Visit us: Capco Careers Slovakia

Our compensation policies are designed to allow our people to progress through our defined salary range over time as they progress in their role.

Your Role – GenAI Engineer

✅ Technical Interviews (1-2 rounds, depending on the project) – Discuss your skills with our experienced Capco colleagues

✅ Feedback & Offer – Receive an offer to join our team!

Why Capco? Because You Matter.

At Capco, we prioritize your career growth and well-being. You will have a personal coach to support your development and a flat hierarchy that encourages you to share and implement your ideas. Plus, our team events, sports activities, and networking opportunities help you stay connected and engaged beyond work.

Curious to learn more? Apply now – it only takes 5 minutes!

📩 Contact: Zora Paulikova – zora.paulikova@capco.com

💻 Connect on LinkedIn: Zora Paulikova | LinkedIn

title: Software Engineer
description_html:

The company collaborates with clients across industries to design, develop, and implement innovative IT solutions that support business growth and efficiency. Teams in the Košice Metropolitan Area focus on delivering high-quality software engineering and infrastructure services for international clients. Capgemini emphasizes continuous learning, inclusive work environments, and opportunities to work with modern technologies and methodologies. Employees benefit from a multinational culture, professional development programs, and hybrid work arrangements.

Role Description This is a full-time hybrid Software Engineer role based in the Košice Metropolitan Area, with some work-from-home flexibility. The Software Engineer will design, develop, test, and maintain backend and full-stack applications, collaborating closely with other engineers, analysts, and stakeholders. Daily tasks include implementing new features, fixing defects, writing clean and maintainable code, and participating in code reviews. The role also involves contributing to technical design discussions, ensuring software quality through unit and integration tests, and supporting deployment and monitoring activities. The Software Engineer will follow agile practices, document technical solutions, and continuously improve systems based on user and business feedback.

Qualifications

  • Strong foundation in Computer Science, including algorithms, data structures, and software engineering principles.
  • Proficiency in Software Development and Programming, with experience in one or more modern languages (e.g., Java, C#, Python, or similar).
  • Solid understanding of Back-End Web Development, including APIs, databases, and server-side frameworks.
  • Experience with Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts and their practical application in production systems.
  • Familiarity with version control tools (e.g., Git) and collaborative development workflows.
  • Ability to analyze requirements, troubleshoot issues, and propose effective technical solutions.
  • Comfort working in agile or iterative delivery environments and in distributed, multicultural teams.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
  • Good communication skills in English; Slovak or other languages are an advantage.
  • Experience with cloud platforms, containerization, or CI/CD pipelines is beneficial.

title: Software Support Engineer
description_html:
About Huzzle

At Huzzle, we connect high-performing professionals with global companies across the UK, US, Canada, Europe, and Australia. Our clients include startups, digital agencies, and tech platforms in industries like SaaS, MarTech, FinTech, and EdTech. We match top talent to full-time remote roles where they're hired directly into client teams and provided ongoing support by Huzzle.

Role Type: Full-time

Engagement: Independent Contractor

About The Company

Our client is a rapidly growing AI-powered validation technology company serving pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device innovators globally. Their platform helps life sciences organizations dramatically reduce validation costs, accelerate compliance workflows, and streamline complex digital validation processes through intelligent automation and AI-driven assurance.

As the company continues its growth journey, they are expanding their engineering team to support a growing international customer base.

Job Summary

We are seeking a Junior Support Engineer to join a fast-growing software company operating at the intersection of AI and life sciences. This role is ideal for an early-career software engineer who enjoys solving technical problems, debugging applications, and helping customers succeed.

As the first line of technical support, you will investigate customer issues, troubleshoot application problems, implement fixes, and communicate solutions clearly to customers. You'll work closely with Product, QA, and Engineering teams while gaining hands-on experience across modern web technologies including Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript, and Supabase.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking to grow their software engineering career in a supportive startup environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Quickly learn and understand the company's Next.js, React, Node.js, and Supabase application architecture
  • Investigate customer-reported issues and reproduce bugs within the application
  • Use Cursor or similar AI-assisted development tools to inspect code, analyze call stacks, and identify root causes
  • Develop and deploy maintainable TypeScript fixes across both frontend and backend systems
  • Improve edge-case handling, application reliability, and performance
  • Write clear and customer-friendly email responses explaining technical issues and resolutions
  • Support customers professionally and calmly during high-pressure situations
  • Collaborate with Product, QA, and Engineering teams to prioritize urgent issues and releases
  • Contribute to internal documentation, knowledge bases, and support runbooks
  • Help improve monitoring, alerting, and recurring issue prevention processes

Requirements

  • Experience with Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript, Supabase, SQL, and Cursor or similar AI-assisted development tools
  • Strong debugging, troubleshooting, and problem-solving abilities
  • Solid understanding of software engineering principles, coding best practices, and modern development workflows
  • Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and execute tasks with minimal supervision
  • Excellent written English communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts clearly to customers
  • Customer-focused mindset with strong interpersonal skills and the ability to remain calm under pressure
  • Experience communicating directly with customers regarding technical issues is highly preferred
  • Experience building, shipping, or maintaining software applications independently is a plus
  • Exposure to SaaS products, technical support, or support engineering environments is advantageous
  • Familiarity with version control systems and collaborative software development practices
  • Interest in AI, healthcare technology, biotechnology, or life sciences industries is beneficial

Benefits

💻 Fully Remote: Work from anywhere with international teams

🤝 Peer Community: Connect with high-performing sales professionals in our network

🧭 Ongoing Support: Receive guidance from Huzzle before and after placement

💰 Tailored Compensation: Salaries vary by client and candidate preference — we'll match you with options that fit your goals

title: Junior Security Operations Specialist (DLP & SIEM)
description_html:
Job Description

Start v kyberbezpečnosti, kde se naučíš pracovat s incidenty i moderními nástroji

Chceš nastartovat kariéru v kyberbezpečnosti a pracovat v prostředí, kde se naučíš, jak funguje Security Operations v praxi?

Hledáme juniorního kolegu do SOC týmu, který bude pracovat s bezpečnostními alerty, pomáhat s ochranou dat a postupně se zapojovat do řešení incidentů i zlepšování detekčních pravidel.

Your future duties and responsibilities

  • Práce s bezpečnostními alerty (SIEM / DLP)

Budeš vyhodnocovat alerty, rozlišovat mezi reálnými hrozbami a false positives a učit se, jak funguje detekce útoků.

  • Podpora při řešení incidentů

Zapojíš se do analýzy bezpečnostních incidentů, budeš sbírat informace, dokumentovat průběh a spolupracovat se zkušenějšími kolegy.

  • Základy práce s DLP (ochrana dat)

Pomůžeš s vyhodnocováním alertů a správou výjimek. Postupně se naučíš, jak nastavovat pravidla tak, aby dávala smysl.

  • Monitoring a zlepšování detekce

Naučíš se, jak fungují SIEM nástroje, jak vznikají detekční pravidla a jak se ladí, aby byly efektivní.

  • Spolupráce v týmu

Budeš pracovat s kolegy ze SOC, infrastruktury i bezpečnosti a postupně se učit komunikovat technická témata srozumitelně.

Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role

  • Máš základní orientaci v kyberbezpečnosti (škola, kurzy, vlastní projekty nebo první praxe)
  • Zajímá tě, jak fungují kybernetické útoky a jak je detekovat
  • Máš základní přehled o sítích, operačních systémech nebo IT infrastruktuře
  • Chceš se učit nové věci a rozvíjet se v oblasti security
  • Jsi pečlivý/á a baví tě analyzovat problémy

Co oceníme navíc

  • Základní zkušenost se SOC, SIEM nebo security nástroji (např. Sentinel, QRadar, Defender…)
  • Znalost základních pojmů (SIEM, DLP, EDR, MITRE ATT&CK)
  • Skriptování (PowerShell, Python) nebo zájem o automatizaci
  • Certifikace nebo kurzy (např. Security+, SC-200, CySA+)

Benefity

  • Akciový program
  • CGI program pomoci
  • Plně hrazená nemocenská až 30 dní v roce
  • Bezúročné půjčky
  • Referral program
  • Stravenky 140Kč
  • Životní pojištění
  • Očkování proti chřipce a klíšťové encefalitidě
  • Multisport karta
  • Kafeterie 900Kč měsíčně
  • Hybridní pracovní model a flexibilní pracovní doba
  • 5 týdnů dovolené + 3 dny sick day
  • Narozeninové volno a CSR den

A mnoho dalších…



Společně, jako vlastníci, převádíme odborné znalosti do praxe.

Život ve společnosti CGI je založen na vlastnictví, týmové práci, respektu a pocitu sounáležitosti. U nás můžete naplno využít svůj potenciál.

Zveme vás, abyste se od prvního dne stali vlastníky. Společně pracujeme na tom, aby se náš sen stal skutečností. Proto o sobě mluvíme jako o partnerech CGI, a ne jako o zaměstnancích. Těžíme z našeho společného úspěchu a máme možnost a odpovědnost aktivně se podílet na směřování a strategii naší společnosti.

Vaše práce vytváří hodnoty. Budete rozvíjet inovativní řešení a trvalé vztahy s kolegy a klienty a zároveň budete mít přístup ke globálním možnostem, abyste mohli proměnit své nápady ve skutečnost, využít nové příležitosti a těžit z předních odborných znalostí v oboru a technologií.

Budete rozvíjet svou kariéru tím, že se připojíte ke společnosti, která je postavena, aby rostla a přetrvala. Podpoří vás vedoucí pracovníci, kterým záleží na vašem zdraví a pohodě, a kteří vám pomohou využít příležitostí k rozvoji vašich dovedností a rozšíření obzorů.

Přidejte se k nám, k jedné z největších firem poskytujících poradenské služby v oblasti IT na světě.

title: Junior Software Engineer
description_html:
Writing software is your hobby. You want to team up with great people because that’s the best way to grow and learn. You want your work to make a positive impact in the world. You love the idea that your code can help combat global crime. Is this you? Then you will fit well in our team.

We are building cutting-edge solutions to create a safer world and stop money from ending up in the hands of criminals. Your work will allow our clients to identify and understand criminal, financial, and political risks, updating dynamically as new data becomes available from various sources (sanctions, watchlists, corporate registries, media, …).

As a Junior Software Engineer, you will:

  • Collaborate on the design and build distributed data pipelines and the system around our Knowledge Graph to build and improve our next-generation anti-money laundering solution.
  • Work with our product manager(s) to understand and contribute to our goals, find a solution to reach them and prioritise accordingly.
  • Engage in the full product lifecycle, including ideation, design, and deployment and get code from initial requirements to deployed services in production (with help of our SRE teams).
  • Improve scalability, latency and throughput of our pipelines while keeping high standards in systems reliability and resilience.
  • Model data and design schemas to accommodate the needs of our Knowledge Graph and the whole data ecosystem.
  • Collaborate with squads and functions across the company to ensure the quality and impact of your designed solutions.
  • Be responsible for the quality of your code. Write tests, document, and take ownership of the systems that ensure the quality of our code.
  • Work with ML engineers to build and deploy new features for AI-powered components.
  • Actively learn, adopt best practices, identify space for improvement, contribute to our engineering culture and always strive for making us better.
  • Use AI-assisted development tools (like Claude Code or Gemini Code Assist) under guidance to improve your productivity and code quality.

Our Tech Stack:

The data-driven nature of the role and the prominence of Python in the data and ML ecosystem means you will primarily work in Python and engineer data pipelines. Any relevant experience is going to be helpful but we believe that top engineers are able to learn quickly and adapt to new technologies so that we can innovate and react to the fast changing world.

  • Our technology stack is designed to run on public cloud architectures, notably AWS and GCP;
  • Python and Kotlin programming languages;
  • Spark, Databricks, Google Dataproc, Delta lakes for stream and big data processing;
  • Relational (Postgres), large scale NoSQL and graph databases and other distributed or cloud-based object stores;
  • Event-sourced model powered by Kafka for our communication bus;
  • Modern observability solutions (such as Datadog or Grafana);
  • Git, ArgoCD, Terraform, Kubernetes.

About you:

As a Junior Software Engineer, you will have:

  • Strong sense of ownership and accountability (you are able to independently drive your work to the successful end and ask for help if needed).
  • Master degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, OR equivalent practical experience (approx 1-2 years of professional experience in relevant role).
  • Intermediate knowledge of one or more programming languages.
  • Experience with Python on a real-world project.
  • Experience with code versioning (Git).
  • Experience with key software engineering concepts like unit tests, databases.
  • At least basic experience with working in cloud environment (preferably GCP, AWS or Azure).
  • Ability to work effectively in a team and communicate clearly.

Nice to haves:

  • Experience working in a multi-disciplinary team of Data Scientists, ML Engineers, SREs and product managers.
  • Experience working with distributed computing.
  • Experience with a real-world production grade system(s) and its deployment.
  • Experience working with knowledge graphs or graph databases.
  • Experience with data analysis, relevant machine learning techniques and graph algorithms.
  • Experience with agile methodologies in software development.
  • Experience in development using Java or Kotlin.

What’s in it for you?

  • Equity as we want you to have a part of what we are building.
  • Unlimited Time Off Policy - A work-life balance and focus on our well-being are critical to keeping us performing at our best.
  • We embrace a hybrid approach that requires employees to be in the office for two days a week. We strongly believe that this approach fosters collaboration and enables the building of meaningful relationships.
  • You will also get a new starter budget to kit out your home office.
  • Opportunity to work on innovative projects with smart-minded people keen to share their knowledge and continuously improve.
  • Annual learning budget (prorated based on start date) to drive your performance and career development.

The base salary for this role is 850,000 CZK + equity and benefits. The actual pay may vary based on factors such as location, experience, and skills.

About us:

Our mission is to empower every business to eliminate financial crime.

By harnessing AI, a unified platform, and an extensive partner ecosystem, we help customers turn compliance into a catalyst for growth, operational resilience, and enduring regulatory trust.

More than 3,000 enterprises across 75 countries rely on our end-to-end platform and the world’s most comprehensive financial crime risk intelligence. With full-stack agentic automation, we help organizations automate up to 95% of KYC, AML, and sanctions reviews, cut onboarding times by 50%, reduce false positives by 70%, and handle 7x more work with the same staff.

ComplyAdvantage is headquartered in London and has global hubs in New York, Lisbon, Singapore, and Cluj-Napoca. It is backed by Balderton Capital, Index Ventures, Ontario Teachers’ Pension Plan, Goldman Sachs, and Andreessen Horowitz. Learn more about compliance re-engineered for the age of AI at complyadvantage.com.

title: eCommerce Technical IT Operations Professional - Hybrid - Bratislava/Žilina/Košice
description_html:
You’d like to support shaping the future of healthcare? We at Siemens Healthineers put our focus on people that dedicate their energy and passion towards this goal. Siemens Healthineers stands for the pioneering spirit of our employees, together with our long-lasting tradition as a world-leading technology company in the ever-changing healthcare industry. We offer a flexible and dynamic work environment full of opportunities to grow and to foster personal and professional development. Does this appeal to you? Then become part of our global eCommerce team as Technical IT Operations Professional.

This is a hybrid position with possible locations in Bratislava, Žilina, or Košice.

Tasks and Responsibilities:

  • Evaluate assigned incidents, resolve where possible. Seek additional information and clarifications from requester if necessary. Assign incidents to the technical team if necessary and ensure a smooth handover.
  • Coordinate with business in understanding and finalizing Change Requests
  • You will be dealing with business stakeholders in EMEA region in supporting Webshops
  • You will work with the technical team to coordinate testing and implementation of Change Requests
  • Once trained in our Service Transition and Project Management processes and upon becoming familiar with webshop functionality, you will also be Project Manager for initiatives in this area
  • You shall work closely with other eCommerce team colleagues located in the US, Germany and India.
  • Ability to effectively analyze, identify and troubleshoot production issues.
  • Create, Manage and Execute test cases in Azure DevOps.
  • Support Business for UAT testing and coordinate with development team for bug/issue resolutions.

Technical Skills:

  • Must be familiar with functions of ecommerce sites. Specific experience supporting SAP Commerce Cloud-based web applications would be a plus.
  • Familiarity with ServiceNow based incident and change management process tools would be a plus.
  • Experience with usage of test management tools like Azure DevOps

Soft Skills:

  • Fluency in English. Excellent written and oral communication skills are required.
  • Fluency in other European languages such as German is a plus, but is not a core requirement
  • Ability to work effectively in a virtual team setting with peers, other IT teams, and business stakeholders across different countries and cultures.
  • Learn to use SAP to support first-level troubleshooting.

What do we offer:

  • Variable and Christmas bonus
  • Hybrid type of work – combination of telework and work from office
  • Flexible Working Hours
  • Bridge days – free extra paid leave 6 days per year
  • 3 sick days per year (no doctor’s permit needed)
  • In case of sickness 100% salary reimbursement 20 days/ year, this includes max. 10 days/ year for of family care
  • Additional pension plan
  • 300 EUR for regeneration of work force via cafeteria system
  • Wellbeing program – Psychological, Legal and Financial Councelling
  • Family care program (subsidy for newborns, maternity leave, kindergardens, summer camps)
  • Retention program (work anniversary, life anniversary, employee loans)
  • Training and development program (business and product trainings, e-learning, language courses, soft skills trainings,…)
  • Adjustable standing desk as a standard
  • Participation on world famous IT conferences like Microsoft IGNITE for best employees
  • Wide project portfolio in healthcare domain and job rotation within company (Cybersecurity, Artificial Intelligence, Healthcare IT services, …)

In line with applicable pay transparency requirements, the minimum gross monthly base salary for this position is 2 300€.

In addition, this role includes a variable compensation component, depending on individual and/or company performance.

The final offer will be determined based on qualifications, skills, and experience and may exceed the stated minimum.

title: Database Engineer - Database as a Service (DBaaS)
description_html:
About The Role

Join our Database as a Service (DBaaS) team and help build, operate, and improve a core platform used across Swiss Re. We provide secure, stable, and easy-to-use database services with a strong focus on automation and self-service capabilities, supporting both private and public cloud environments.

We are looking for a hands-on Database Engineer who enjoys working with enterprise database platforms and is interested in automation, reliability, and continuous improvement.

You will work as part of an experienced and collaborative engineering team responsible for Oracle and PostgreSQL database platforms. The role combines database engineering, operations, automation, and modernization activities, contributing to reliable and scalable services used across the organization.

Operational on-call coverage is limited (approximately once every two months and decreasing as the team grows) and applies only to high-priority incidents. The team follows a "you build it, you run it" philosophy and continuously strives to automate operational activities wherever possible.

What You Will Do

Database Engineering & Operations

  • Support and improve enterprise Oracle and PostgreSQL database platforms
  • Perform database administration, troubleshooting, and operational activities
  • Contribute to platform reliability, availability, backup, recovery, and disaster recovery capabilities
  • Investigate and resolve performance issues across database environments
  • Participate in production support and incident resolution activities
  • Create and maintain technical documentation and operational procedures

Automation & Platform Improvement

  • Contribute to automation initiatives across database platforms
  • Develop and maintain scripts, tools, and Infrastructure as Code solutions
  • Support modernization efforts across Oracle, PostgreSQL, and cloud-based database services
  • Help improve self-service capabilities used by internal engineering teams
  • Participate in platform improvements focused on reliability, efficiency, and operational excellence

Collaboration & Delivery

  • Work closely with database engineers, application teams, and cloud platform teams
  • Participate in agile ceremonies and backlog refinement activities
  • Share knowledge, ideas, and best practices within the team
  • Contribute to technical discussions and solution design activities
  • Help identify opportunities for continuous improvement

About You

Nobody meets 100% of the requirements — and that's perfectly fine. If you meet most of the qualifications below and are interested in enterprise database platforms, cloud technologies, and automation, we'd be happy to meet you.

You will join a highly skilled, dedicated, and cross-functional database team located between Bratislava and Zürich within Global Technology Services.

Minimum Qualifications

  • Experience with Oracle and/or PostgreSQL database administration
  • Experience supporting database platforms in enterprise environments
  • Good understanding of database performance analysis and SQL tuning
  • Experience with high availability, backup, recovery, and operational support activities
  • Experience with scripting and automation (Shell/Bash, PL/SQL, Python, or similar)
  • Experience working with Linux-based environments
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Attention to detail and quality-oriented mindset
  • Hands-on attitude and willingness to continuously learn and improve
  • Professional proficiency in English

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Oracle RAC, Exadata, or Oracle Cloud Infrastructure
  • Experience with PostgreSQL administration and operations
  • Experience with public cloud platforms (Azure, OCI, AWS)
  • Experience with Infrastructure as Code and automation tooling
  • Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
  • Experience with monitoring and observability platforms
  • One or more Oracle or cloud-related certifications
  • Interest in AIOps, machine learning, or statistical modelling

What We Are Looking For

  • Someone comfortable working with existing systems and improving them step by step
  • A pragmatic mindset focused on practical and sustainable solutions
  • Ability to balance technical quality with business needs
  • Strong ownership and accountability for delivered work
  • A collaborative team player who enjoys sharing knowledge and solving problems together
  • Curiosity and willingness to learn new technologies and approaches

Role

For Slovakia the base salary range for this position is between EUR 2,800 and EUR 4,600 per month (for a full-time role). The specific salary offered considers:

  • the requirements, scope, complexity and responsibilities of the role,
  • the applicant’s own profile including education/qualifications, expertise, specialisation, skills and experience.

In addition to your base salary, Swiss Re offers an attractive performance-based variable compensation component, designed to recognise your achievements. Further you will enjoy a variety of global and location specific benefits.

Eligibility may vary depending on the terms of Swiss Re policies and your employment contract.

About Swiss Re

Swiss Re is one of the world’s leading providers of reinsurance, insurance and other forms of insurance-based risk transfer, working to make the world more resilient. We anticipate and manage a wide variety of risks, from natural catastrophes and climate change to cybercrime. Combining experience with creative thinking and cutting-edge expertise, we create new opportunities and solutions for our clients. This is possible thanks to the collaboration of more than 14,000 employees across the world.

Our success depends on our ability to build an inclusive culture encouraging fresh perspectives and innovative thinking. We embrace a workplace where everyone has equal opportunities to thrive and develop professionally regardless of their age, gender, race, ethnicity, gender identity and/or expression, sexual orientation, physical or mental ability, skillset, thought or other characteristics. In our inclusive and flexible environment everyone can bring their authentic selves to work and their passion for sustainability.

If you are an experienced professional returning to the workforce after a career break, we encourage you to apply for open positions that match your skills and experience.
